scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @pedeform/web" "npm run start:dev -w @pedeform/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pedeform/web && npm run build -w @pedeform/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @pedeform/web && npm run lint -w @pedeform/api
scripts.setup:env: cp -n apps/web/.env.example apps/web/.env.local && echo 'Edite apps/web/.env.local: Firebase Console → Configurações → app Web → firebaseConfig.'
